abstract.p: Read this topic to review sample configuration files for the network attachment definition (NAD) manifests and pod manifests for various L2 and L3 use cases of JCNR.

section.title: Cloud-Native Router Sample Workload Configuration Files
section.p: This section provides sample NADs and pod manifests for the various JCNR interface types.
section.codeph: Network Attachment Definition (NAD) manifest for Trunk mode pod interface
Pod Manifest to create a Trunk mode interface attached to the L2 switching instance of the cloud-native router
section.codeblock: apiVersion: v1 kind: Pod metadata: name: odu-trunk-1 annotations: k8s.v1.cni.cncf.io/networks: nad-vswitch-bd3002 <--- Defined by NAD spec: containers: - name: odu-trunk image: pktgen19116:trunk imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent securityContext: privileged: true resources: requests: memory: 2Gi limits: hugepages-1Gi: 2Gi env: - name: KUBERNETES_POD_UID valueFrom: fieldRef: fieldPath: metadata.uid volumeMounts: - name: dpdk mountPath: /dpdk subPathExpr: $(KUBERNETES_POD_UID) - mountPath: /dev/hugepages name: hugepage volumes: - name: dpdk hostPath: path: /var/run/jcnr/containers - name: hugepage emptyDir: medium: HugePages
section.codeph: Network Attachment Definition (NAD) manifest for Access mode pod interface
Pod Manifest to create an Access mode interface attached to the L2 switching instance of the cloud-native router
section.codeblock: apiVersion: v1 kind: Pod metadata: name: odu-kenel-pod-bd3001-1 annotations: k8s.v1.cni.cncf.io/networks: pod1-vswitch-bd3001-1 <--- Defined by NAD spec: affinity: nodeAffinity: requiredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution: nodeSelectorTerms: - matchExpressions: - key: kubernetes.io/hostname operator: In values: - 5d8s7.englab.juniper.net containers: - name: odu-kenel-pod-bd3001-1 image: iperf3:latest imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent command: ["/bin/bash","-c","sleep infinity"] securityContext: privileged: false env: - name: KUBERNETES_POD_UID valueFrom: fieldRef: fieldPath: metadata.uid volumeMounts: - name: dpdk mountPath: /dpdk subPathExpr: $(KUBERNETES_POD_UID) volumes: - name: dpdk hostPath: path: /var/run/jcnr/containers

p.codeph: Network Attachment Definition (NAD) manifest for VLAN sub-interface
Network Attachment Definition (NAD) manifest for an additional VLAN sub-interface
Pod Manifest to create sub-interfaces attached to the L2 switching instance of the cloud-native router

section.codeblock: apiVersion: v1 kind: Pod metadata: name: odu-subinterface-1 annotations: k8s.v1.cni.cncf.io/networks: | [ { "name": "vswitch-bd3003-sub" <--- Defined by NAD }, { "name": "vswitch-bd3004-sub" <--- Defined by NAD } ] spec: affinity: nodeAffinity: requiredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution: nodeSelectorTerms: - matchExpressions: - key: kubernetes.io/hostname operator: In values: - 5d7s39.englab.juniper.net containers: - name: odu-subinterface image: svl-artifactory.juniper.net/junos-docker-local/warthog/pktgen19116:subint imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent securityContext: privileged: false resources: requests: memory: 2Gi limits: hugepages-1Gi: 2Gi env: - name: KUBERNETES_POD_UID valueFrom: fieldRef: fieldPath: metadata.uid volumeMounts: - name: dpdk mountPath: /dpdk subPathExpr: $(KUBERNETES_POD_UID) - mountPath: /dev/hugepages name: hugepage volumes: - name: dpdk hostPath: path: /var/run/jcnr/containers - name: hugepage emptyDir: medium: HugePages

p.codeph: Network Attachment Definition (NAD) manifest for an L3 interface

section.codeblock: apiVersion: "k8s.cni.cncf.io/v1" kind: NetworkAttachmentDefinition metadata: name: net1 spec: config: '{ "cniVersion":"0.4.0", "name": "net1", "type": "jcnr", "args": { "vrfName": "net1", "vrfTarget": "1:11" }, "kubeConfig":"/etc/kubernetes/kubelet.conf" }'

p.codeph: Pod Manifest to create a pod interface attached to the cloud-native router deployed as a transit router

section.codeblock: apiVersion: v1 kind: Pod metadata: name: L3-pktgen-odu1 annotations: k8s.v1.cni.cncf.io/networks: | [ { "name": "net1", <--- Defined by NAD "interface":"net1", "cni-args": { "mac":"aa:bb:cc:dd:ee:51", "dataplane":"vrouter", "ipConfig":{ "ipv4":{ "address":"10.1.51.2/30", "gateway":"10.1.51.1", "routes":[ "10.1.51.0/30" ] }, "ipv6":{ "address":"2001:db8::10:1:51:2/126", "gateway":"2001:db8::10:1:51:1", "routes":[ "2001:db8::1:1:51:0/126" ] } } } } ] spec: containers: - name: L3-pktgen-odu1 image: svl-artifactory.juniper.net/blr-data-plane/dpdk-app/dpdk:21.11 imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent command: ["/bin/bash","-c","sleep infinity"] securityContext: privileged: false env: - name: KUBERNETES_POD_UID valueFrom: fieldRef: fieldPath: metadata.uid resources: requests: memory: 4Gi limits: hugepages-1Gi: 4Gi name: hugepages command: ["sleep"] args: ["infinity"] volumeMounts: - name: dpdk mountPath: /dpdk subPathExpr: $(KUBERNETES_POD_UID) - name: hugepages mountPath: /hugepages volumes: - name: dpdk hostPath: path: /var/run/jcnr/containers - name: hugepages emptyDir: medium: HugePages
